name: Booking Holdings
confidenceReason: Textbook GARP. Shrinking float, increasing margins, stable 15%+ EPS growth.

screener.note: DEPLOY override: base CAGR 44% ≥ 20% and stabilized (CYCLICAL EPS)

bullCase: Booking Holdings operates the global OTA duopoly (with Expedia) and is the near-monopoly in European accommodation. Its asset-light model generates 40%+ operating margins. The shift to connected trip — flights, hotels, rental cars, attractions in a single booking — is expanding wallet share per customer. Aggressive share buybacks at 7%+ annually provide EPS floor.
bearCase: Travel spending is among the most discretionary consumer categories — Booking's revenue fell 90%+ in COVID and is sensitive to recession and geopolitical disruption. At 14x forward PE, valuation is attractive but the stock has historically compressed to 10-11x in downturns. Airbnb is taking share in leisure accommodation, particularly in major European cities.
description: Booking Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides online and traditional travel and restaurant reservations and related services in the United States, the Netherlands, the United King...
